cadence_note: No published release schedule. The six data.gov.in resources under org 'Election Commission of India' (https://www.data.gov.in/catalogs) are 2024 Lok Sabha general-election summary tables, republished wholesale rather than appended; their updated_date last moved 2025-09-13. Substantive new data arrives only on an election cycle (next Lok Sabha GE due 2029), so a monthly re-pull is ample: it costs six small API calls and exists to catch restatements and newly-added ECI resources, not routine updates.
